arts.ttl: 'Brilliant': Gary Neville shares what he noticed about Brennan Johnson just before he put Spurs 1-0 up v Man U
Something unusual happened in Manchester United vs Tottenham Hotspur Premier League clash
arts.sum: Both sides will be aiming for a top four spot come the end of the season and a place in next year's Champions League. The big Super Sunday clash in the Premier League came at Old Trafford where Manchester United took on Tottenham Hotspur .

arts.ttl: Man Utd sent Erik ten Hag sack demand midway through Tottenham fixture
arts.sum: Manchester United put in a horror first half display against Ange Postecoglou's side as Brennan Johnson tapped home from Mickey van de Ven's cross in the opening stages of the game

arts.ttl: Martin Keown makes Erik ten Hag prediction as he slams 'astonishing' Man Utd decision
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag has endured a miserable start to his third season as Manchester United manager, a scenario Martin Keown saw coming as soon as he was handed a new contract

arts.ttl: Ashley Young insists Bruno Fernandes' red card was 'WRONG' as Darren Bent slams 'poor decision' to send Man United captain off in first half against Tottenham
arts.sum: Former Manchester United star Ashley Young believed referee Chris Kavanagh was 'wrong' in his decision to send Bruno Fernandes off against Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Kulusevski adds a Spurs second right after restart!
arts.sum: Dejan Kulusevski adds to Manchester United's misery, as he doubles the visitors lead.

arts.ttl: Manchester United games Bruno Fernandes will miss as Erik ten Hag handed nightmare scenario
arts.sum: Manchester United playmaker Bruno Fernandes was sent off against Tottenham Hotspur

arts.ttl: Kulusevski adds a Spurs second right after restart!
arts.sum: Kulusevski adds a Spurs second right after restart!

arts.ttl: Man Utd playing 'pub football': Neville savages Ten Hag in Spurs clash
arts.sum: Man Utd playing 'pub football': Neville savages Ten Hag in Spurs clash Tottenham were mostly comfortable throughout the half and things went from bad to worse for Man Utd when captain Bruno Fernandes got himself sent off.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Bruno Fernandes slammed by Gary Neville as red card sums up Man Utd: 'An absolute disgrace'
arts.sum: Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes was sent off just before half-time after his side endured a miserable opening period in their clash with Tottenham on Sunday
